Use the Centrifuge to enrich Uranium. Reactor fuel blend requires Uranium at 20%% or higher.
jei.create_nuclearindustry.enriched_blen: Crafted from 4 Uranium stacks enriched to 20%% or higher plus 1 Boron. Enriched Uranium is produced in the Centrifuge.
create_nuclearindustry.ponder.centrifuge: The Centrifuge is a kinetic machine for refining uranium.
It accepts rotational power from any horizontal side.
Right-click with Raw Uranium or Uranium to insert one item.
At 16 RPM or faster, the Centrifuge processes the input over time.
Extract finished uranium from the bottom, or right-click with an empty hand.
create_nuclearindustry.ponder.reactor_co: The reactor is a multiblock: raise a hollow shell of Reactor Casing.
The width must be odd (3-9) and the height 4-12.
Inside, raise at least one column of Uranium Rods: the fuel.
Add at least one column of Heat Exchangers to carry the heat into the coolant.
Leave air columns and drop in Control Rods to throttle the reaction.
Swap wall casing for a Reactor Fluid Port set to INPUT for coolant...
...and another set to OUTPUT for steam.
A Reactor Fuel Port loads uranium fuel and ejects depleted fuel.
Cap the reactor and place the Reactor Controller at the centre of the top face.
Right-click the controller to form the reactor.
create_nuclearindustry.ponder.turbine.te: The Steam Turbine turns steam into rotational power. Start with a Turbine Casing.
Place a Turbine Rotor in front of the casing, its axis along the line.
Cap the line with a Turbine Output facing outward: it generates the rotation for your machines.
Feed steam through a Turbine Fluid Port set to INPUT...
...and drain the condensate through another set to OUTPUT.
With steam flowing, the turbine forms on its own and the output shaft powers your contraptions.
